section_miscategorizations.text: He states he wants to quit and is considering nicotine patches and meditation.
section_miscategorizations.reason: The desire to quit is subjective, but the consideration of specific cessation methods (nicotine patches, meditation) functions as treatment planning and overlaps with the management plan documented in P.

section_miscategorizations.text: The patient is planning to join a gym.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is a patient-stated intention rather than a clearly documented clinician recommendation or order; it reads more as subjective history than an explicit management action.

section_miscategorizations.text: The patient is planning to start meditation.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Similar to the gym statement, this reflects the patient's own plan rather than a clearly articulated clinician-directed intervention, so it fits better as subjective information.
